description: Unique numerical ID given to each detected road user
Time at which current road user information are measured relative to start of run (seconds)
x-coordinate of road user relative to global coordinates1 of the reference image after Kalman Filtering (m)
y-coordinate of road user relative to global coordinates1 of the reference image after Kalman Filtering (m)
Lane ID as defined on the reference image after Kalman Filtering
Measured speed in x dimension after Kalman Filtering (m/s)
Measured speed in y dimension after Kalman Filtering (m/s)
Measured acceleration in x dimension after Kalman Filtering (m/s2)
Measured acceleration in y dimension after Kalman Filtering (m/s2)
Smoothed length of bounding box corresponding to the detected vehicle (m) [approx. vehicle length; not applicable (0) for pedestrians, bicycles, and scooters]
Smoothed width of bounding box corresponding to the detected vehicle (m) [approx. vehicle length; not applicable (0) for pedestrians, bicycles, and scooters]
Type of road user detected (0=pedestrian, 1=bicycle, 2=scooter, 3=passenger car, 4=automated vehicle, 5=motorcycle, 6=bus, 7=truck)
